tasks.title: Auth auf GET /api/admin/coaching/sessions hinzufügen
tasks.description: Sicherheitslücke: API Endpoint ohne Admin-Auth zugänglich. Jeder Nutzer kann Coaching-Sessions einsehen.
tasks.details: GET /api/admin/coaching/sessions muss isAdmin() prüfen und bei fehlender/ungültiger Session 403 Forbidden oder 401 Unauthorized zurückgeben.

tasks.title: window.__COACHING_CUSTOMERS__-Datenleck beheben
tasks.description: Sensible Kundendaten werden global im Browser exponiert.
tasks.details: data.jsx schreibt window.__COACHING_CUSTOMERS__ — muss entfernt werden. Daten nur via API laden, nicht global exponieren. Client-Side: Lokale Variable verwenden.

tasks.title: T001775: Unvollständige :latest-Image Exclusions in CLAUDE.md
tasks.description: Update CLAUDE.md to include explicit exclusions for images that intentionally use the :latest tag. These are: Website, Brett, Docs, Videovault, Mediaviewer-Widget, Mentolder-Web, and Downloads. This is to prevent AI agents from trying to "fix" these images by pinning them to specific digests, as they are rebuilt and re-imported on every release.

tasks.title: T001775: Health-Goal: Unvollständige :latest-Image Exclusions in CLAUDE.md
tasks.description: Execute the implementation plan for T001775 (Health-Goal: Unvollständige :latest-Image Exclusions in CLAUDE.md) in the infra area. Follow the RED -> GREEN flow as specified in openspec/changes/health-goal-latest-image-exclusions/tasks.md. Ensure the subagent uses the correct worktree at .worktrees/T001775.
